purpose: Summarizes the public API of PiQApi.Abstractions.PiQApi.Abstractions and provides usage guidance

overview.description: The Abstractions namespace contains components for the PiQApi.Abstractions.PiQApi project.
overview.usage_pattern: Import and use classes from this namespace to work with Abstractions functionality.
